summary: test_stop_flips_to_user_when_no_live_background_task exercises real _has_live_background_task/main logic (fake client only stubs the HTTP boundary) across the boundary payloads (absent field, empty list, terminal-only, case-insensitive terminal) and would fail if the gate wrongly suppressed the flip; complementary REQ-010.1.2/2.x tests cover the live-task complement, so no gap.
